title: System Architecture Review - Q1 2024
overview: This report provides a comprehensive review of the system architecture changes implemented during Q1 2024. Key focus areas include microservices migration, database optimization, and implementation of the new caching layer.
methodology: Architecture review was conducted using a combination of automated tooling and manual code review. Performance benchmarks were established using JMeter load testing with 10,000 concurrent users. Security audits were performed using OWASP ZAP and manual penetration testing.
results: The microservices migration is 80% complete with significant improvements in system resilience. API response times improved by 40% after implementing Redis caching. Database query optimization reduced average query time from 120ms to 45ms.
conclusion: The Q1 architecture improvements have positioned the platform for 3x scale growth. Remaining work includes completing the final two monolith services migration and implementing the new event-driven notification system planned for Q2.
